list_subtitle: Discover amazing tours in Da Nang

landing.meta_title: Da Nang Tours - Best Price, Daily Departure | DanangTrip
landing.meta_description: Explore amazing Da Nang tours: Marble Mountains, Hoi An, Ba Na Hills, Cham Island. Book online, 24/7 support.
landing.hero_subtitle: Discover the most attractive tours in the most livable city in Vietnam.
landing.content:
Discover Da Nang - The city of bridges

Da Nang is known not only for beautiful beaches like My Khe, but also for distinctive architecture, scenic landmarks, and memorable local experiences...

faqs.question: When is the best time to visit Da Nang?
faqs.answer: The ideal time is from April to August, when the weather is sunny with little rain, making it suitable for beach activities and sightseeing.

faqs.question: What are the most popular Da Nang tours?
faqs.answer: Popular choices include Ba Na Hills, Marble Mountains - Hoi An, Cham Island, and Son Tra Peninsula tours.

subtitle: Discover amazing journeys in Da Nang

booking.terms_agree: I agree to the <terms>Terms of Use</terms> and <policy>Tour Cancellation Policy</policy> of Danang Trip.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.body: By accessing the website and booking services with Danang Trip, you confirm that you have read, understood and agreed to follow these terms of use. If you do not agree with any term, please stop using the service.

sections.title: 2. Eligibility and Information Responsibility
sections.body: Customers making online tour bookings must be at least 18 years old or under the supervision of a parent or legal guardian. You are responsible for the accuracy of your name, phone number, email, address and booking details.

sections.title: 3. Pricing and Payment
sections.body: All prices displayed on the website are in Vietnamese Dong (VND). Danang Trip supports SePay VietQR: scan the transfer QR code and the system automatically confirms payment 24/7 after a successful transaction.
sections.note: After a successful payment IPN is received, the system automatically updates the order and sends a confirmation email.

sections.title: 4. Tour Participation Rules
items: Punctuality: please arrive at the pickup point at least 15 minutes before departure.
Safety: please follow instructions from the tour guide and transportation provider.
Personal belongings: you are responsible for your luggage, documents and valuables throughout the trip.

sections.title: 5. Information Privacy
sections.body: Personal information is used only to confirm bookings, process payments, support customers and improve service quality. Danang Trip does not sell or trade customer personal data to third parties for commercial purposes.

sections.title: 1. Standard Cancellation Fees
sections.body: Cancellation fees are calculated based on when you notify us compared with the scheduled departure time.

sections.title: 2. Accidental booking grace period
sections.body: A 100% refund applies when cancellation is requested within 30 minutes after payment and departure is at least 12 hours away. This does not apply to holiday, Tet or peak-season tours.

sections.title: 3. Holiday, Tet and DIFF Tours
sections.body: For tours during Lunar New Year, New Year, Vietnam National Day, April 30-May 1 or the Da Nang International Fireworks Festival (DIFF), cancellation requests must be made at least 7 days in advance. Late cancellations may incur a 100% tour fee.

sections.title: 3. Rescheduling
sections.body: You may request a free departure date change if you notify us at least 48 hours before the original schedule and seats are still available on the new date.

sections.title: 4. Force Majeure Due to Weather or Natural Disasters
sections.body: If authorities or destination management boards require a tour to stop due to storms, natural disasters, rough seas, cable car suspension or unsafe conditions, Danang Trip will notify customers as early as possible.
items: Support rescheduling to another suitable departure date.
Process up to a 100% refund after Danang Trip reconciles the transaction if the customer cannot arrange a new schedule.

booking.cancellation_note: Cancellation fees and refund eligibility depend on the cancellation time compared with departure. Any eligible refund is processed after admin transaction reconciliation.
